# Vendor Documentation

This folder contains vendor-supplied documentation and templates for the target
project.

## Files

| File | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [.gitkeep](.gitkeep) | Placeholder file so the folder remains tracked when content changes. |

## Usage

- Add new vendor documents with clear, versioned filenames when possible.
- Keep source files unchanged and add derived notes under [docs/internal/](../internal/).
- Remove obsolete vendor files when they are superseded.
